Daddy’s Home (2015)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $150,357,137Details
International Box Office $91,147,852
Worldwide Box Office $241,504,989
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $11,346,351
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $6,611,701
Total $17,958,052
Further financial details...

Synopsis

A mild-mannered radio executive strives to become the best stepdad to his wife’s two children, but complications ensue when their freewheeling and freeloading real father arrives, forcing him to compete for the affection of the kids.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$38,740,203 (25.8% of total gross)
Legs:3.88 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:62.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$50,000,000 (worldwide box office is 4.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,271 opening theaters/3,483 max. theaters, 6.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $210,226,685

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 25th, 2015 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
International Releases: December 25th, 2015 (Wide) (Cambodia)
December 25th, 2015 (Wide), released as Daddy's Home (United Kingdom)
December 26th, 2015 (Wide), released as Daddy's Home (New Zealand)
December 26th, 2015 (Wide), released as Daddy's Home (Australia)
December 31st, 2015 (Wide) (Malaysia)
Video Release: March 8th, 2016 by Paramount Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for thematic elements, crude and suggestive content, and for language.
(Rating bulletin 2404 (Cert #49962), 12/16/2015)
Running Time: 96 minutes
Franchise: Daddy’s Home
Plot point: Dysfunctional Family, Step-Family
Subgenre: Family Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Paramount Pictures, Red Granite Pictures, Gary Sanchez Productions
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

A mild-mannered radio executive strives to become the best stepdad to his wife’s two children, but complications ensue when their freewheeling and freeloading real father arrives, forcing him to compete for the affection of the kids.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$38,740,203 (25.8% of total gross)
Legs:3.88 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:62.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$50,000,000 (worldwide box office is 4.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,271 opening theaters/3,483 max. theaters, 6.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $210,226,685
